$comment: G4 — baked root of trust. PASTE the REAL public keys from the offline root→roles ceremony into each publicKeyHex below. Every publicKeyHex MUST be byte-identical to the same-named slot in src/suite/config.ts (ROOT/DATA/CODE/SNAPSHOT/TIMESTAMP_PUBKEY_HEX). The root is immutable after install and held offline (HSM); operational keys are delegated by it and rotate. publisher-ci key-separation requires every role to be a DISTINCT key. See THREAT_MODEL.md §2.

feed.$comment: Rolling GitHub Releases tag in the myFinance repo that serves the signed suite metadata/targets (release + masters published here). Kept byte-identical to SUITE_FEED_BASE_URL in src/suite/config.ts.
